text:
July 27, 2024



The Decline of the West on Full Display at the Opening of the Paris Olympics with Open, Blatant Mockery of the Last Supper and Christianity.

The demonic drag queens and other performers were arranged in a configuration that looked similar to that of Jesus Christ and his apostles in Leonardo da Vinci’s‘The Last Supper’.

Straight outta the book,Unhumans: The Secret History of Communist Revolutions (and How to Crush Them).

This is definitely returning to the very celebratory roots of the anti-Christian, Satanic essence of the French Revolution as outlined in the three articles below —

Operation Parricide: Sade, Robespierre & the French Revolution, by Erik von Kuehnelt-Leddihn

Gnosticism: The Enduring Heresy and Menace to Western Civilization, by Charles Burris

In Defense of Western Civilization,by Charles Burris

The Best of Charles Burris
title: The Decline of the West on Full Display at Opening of the Paris Olympics - LRC Blog
